patterns.description: Agent run fails because client config doesn't exist
Template placeholder not replaced in deliverable
patterns.fix: Check training-builder agent — the client config field that maps to this placeholder may be missing or empty

patterns.description: Agent fails because environment variable is missing
patterns.fix: Copy .env.example to .env and fill in ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

patterns.description: Client pipeline stuck in training_building for >48h
patterns.fix: Re-run training-builder with --auto flag or check for Claude API errors in last run

patterns.description: client-slack-setup fails because SLACK_BOT_TOKEN is not set
patterns.fix: Set SLACK_BOT_TOKEN in .env. Get from api.slack.com → Your Apps → OAuth & Permissions → Bot Token (starts with xoxb-). Re-run: ./lib/run-agent.sh client-slack-setup --client <id>

patterns.description: Slack channel creation fails because channel name already exists
patterns.fix: The client-slack-setup agent auto-appends -2/-3 suffix. If it failed, manually rename or delete the conflicting channel and re-run.

patterns.description: contract-generator cannot determine tier because products_purchased.training_package is missing
patterns.fix: Update config/clients/<client_id>.json — set products_purchased.training_package to one of: blueprint, cert_300, build_997, training_contracts. Then re-run: ./lib/run-agent.sh contract-generator --client <id>
30-day checkpoint not due yet. Check delivery.delivered_at in client config. Orchestrator should not trigger until day 28+.

patterns.description: roi-report runs without 30-day checkpoint data — quality gate failure
patterns.fix: Run 30-day-checkpoint first: ./lib/run-agent.sh 30-day-checkpoint --client <id>. Wait for owner response before generating ROI report if possible.

patterns.description: roi-report triggered before 60 days — insufficient data
patterns.fix: ROI report requires minimum 60 days of data. Check delivery.delivered_at. Do not run roi-report before day 60.

patterns.description: integrator-onboarding runs before training-builder has produced deliverables
patterns.fix: Run training-builder first: ./lib/run-agent.sh training-builder --client <id>. Then re-run: ./lib/run-agent.sh integrator-onboarding --client <id>

patterns.description: automation-mapper has no industry data — falls back to generic matrix
patterns.trigger: industry not set in client config
patterns.fix: Add business.industry to config/clients/<client_id>.json before running automation-mapper. If unknown, use 'General Business' and update after the call.

patterns.description: expert-series.md references sibling repo path that doesn't exist
patterns.fix: Clone the expert-series-v3 repo to ~/Desktop/Expert Series/expert-series-v3

patterns.description: Orchestrator posting duplicate upsell signals within cooldown window
patterns.fix: Check state/orchestrator/upsell-log.json — ensure orchestrator reads upsell-log before posting signals.
